title: Define Field List
text: Define Field List Specify the fields that Uniface manages at run time for the current component entity. The default field list type is Automatic, meaning that Uniface manages only the fields referenced in the component. For more information, see Field Lists . Fields Field List —specified how the field list is determined. Valid values are Automatic (default), All Fields , and User-defined . Fields—lists the fields of the modeled entity from which this component entity is derived. How to Set the value of the Field List property. If you choose, User-defined , a checkbox is displayed in front of each field, enabling you to select the fields you want to have. Uniface manage, in addition to those that are included automatically. Click OK to save your selection. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
